summary: Bubble Tea sub-model for the Sources view: channel list navigation, delete confirmation, and three-step add-source wizard (type → name → url)
side_effects: Manages channel list state: cursor position, delete confirmation flag
Implements three-step add-source wizard with text input buffering
Renders source badges with type identifiers (TG, RSS, RD, HN)
config_deps: keys (keyMap from keys.go) — Up, Down, Delete, Add, Confirm, Cancel
titleStyle, helpDescStyle, sourceTypeBadgeStyle, selectedStyle, unselectedStyle, messageCountStyle, channelNameStyle (from styles.go)
sourceTypeBadge helper function (from dashboard.go, same package)
notes: channelsModel implements the Sources tab of the TUI. 7 functions: constructor, Update with three message types (channelsLoadedMsg, channelDeletedMsg, KeyMsg), three handlers for different modes (handleNormalKey, handleConfirmKey, handleAddKey), View, renderAddView. sourceTypeOptions = [telegram, rss, reddit, hackernews]. Add wizard collects sourceType, name (username), and url (varies: channel handle for TG, feed URL for RSS, subreddit for Reddit, feed type for HN). View shows channel list with badges and 'Added' dates, delete confirmation prompt.
